---
title: "Foodweb Builder"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Foodweb Builder}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
## Figure options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.align = "center",
  dpi = 150
)

## Load libraries
library(foodwebbuilder)
```

## Step 1: Load data

```{r}
## Individual body length measurements
data(ind_measure)
head(ind_measure)
nrow(ind_measure)

## Fish ontogenetic diet shifts
data(fish_diet_shift)
head(fish_diet_shift)
nrow(fish_diet_shift)

## Resource ontogenetic diet shifts
data(resource_diet_shift)
head(resource_diet_shift)
nrow(resource_diet_shift)

## Fish predation windows
data(pred_win)
head(pred_win)
nrow(pred_win)
```

## Step 2: Remove missing species

```{r}
## Filter out species not present in reference files
ind_clean <- remove_missing_species(ind_measure, fish_diet_shift, pred_win)
```

## Step 3: Compute size classes

```{r}
## Compute size classes
size_classes <- compute_size_classes(
  ind_measure = ind_clean,
  num_classes = 5
)

head(size_classes)
```

## Step 4: Build metaweb from size classes

```{r}
## Global variable
selected_resources <- c("det", "biof", "phytob", "macroph",
                        "phytopl", "zoopl", "zoob")

## Build metaweb
metaweb <- build_metaweb(
  tab_size_classes    = size_classes,
  pred_win            = pred_win,
  fish_diet_shift     = fish_diet_shift,
  resource_diet_shift = resource_diet_shift,
  num_classes         = 5,
  selected_resources  = selected_resources,
  method_resource_fish    = "midpoint",
  method_predation_window = "midpoint",
  method_fish_fish        = "midpoint"
)
```

## Step 5: Build local foodweb

```{r}
## Build one local food web per operation_id
local_foodwebs <- build_local_foodweb(
  ind_measure       = ind_measure,
  local_id          = "operation_id",         # column in ind_measure
  metaweb           = metaweb,
  tab_size_classes  = size_classes,
  selected_resources  = selected_resources
)

## Inspect how many local food webs were built
length(local_foodwebs)

## Extract one local food web to visualise, e.g. the first one
local_fw <- local_foodwebs[[1]]
```

## Step 6: Visualisations

```{r, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
## Visualise one local food web
mat <- as.matrix(local_fw)

pal <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100)
cex_x <- 0.55
cex_y <- 0.65
tick_len <- 0.015

old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
on.exit(par(old_par), add = TRUE)

par(mar = c(2, 10, 10, 2), xpd = NA)

# Flip rows so the first row appears at the top
z <- mat[nrow(mat):1, , drop = FALSE]

graphics::image(
  x = seq_len(ncol(mat)),
  y = seq_len(nrow(mat)),
  z = t(z),
  col = pal,
  axes = FALSE,
  xlab = "",
  ylab = ""
)

graphics::box()

# Ticks only (no automatic labels)
graphics::axis(3, at = seq_len(ncol(mat)), labels = FALSE, tck = -tick_len)
graphics::axis(2, at = seq_len(nrow(mat)), labels = FALSE, tck = -tick_len)

# Manual labels (all)
graphics::text(
  x = seq_len(ncol(mat)),
  y = nrow(mat) + 0.8,
  labels = colnames(mat),
  srt = 90, adj = 0, cex = cex_x
)

graphics::text(
  x = -0.3,
  y = seq_len(nrow(mat)),
  labels = rev(rownames(mat)),
  adj = 1, cex = cex_y
)

# Titles, stacked above the axis labels
graphics::mtext("Local Food web", side = 3, line = 7.5, font = 2, cex = 1.2)
graphics::mtext("Consumers / Predators (columns)", side = 3, line = 3.5, font = 2)
graphics::mtext("Prey / Resources (rows)", side = 2, line = 4.5, font = 2)
```
